name: Arjun Mehta
financial_goals: Build a retirement corpus of ₹10Cr by age 55
Save ₹25L for a home down payment in 5 years
life_stage: Young earner, single, no dependents, first job in IT
additional_context: Tech-savvy, reads financial blogs, willing to learn about investing.

name: Priya Sharma
financial_goals: Children's higher education fund of ₹50L in 15 years
Pay off home loan within 10 years
life_stage: Dual-income household, two young children, home loan EMI
additional_context: Limited time for active investing. Prefers set-and-forget approach.

name: Rajesh Iyer
financial_goals: Daughter's wedding fund of ₹30L in 5 years
life_stage: Senior manager, single earner, teenager at home, approaching peak earning years
additional_context: Has some experience with mutual funds. Open to direct equity if guided.

name: Meena Krishnan
financial_goals: Preserve capital and generate ₹1.5L/month income post-retirement in 5 years
Leave inheritance of ₹2Cr for two children
life_stage: Pre-retiree, empty nester, no liabilities, spouse also nearing retirement
additional_context: Risk-averse after 2008 market crash experience. Values capital preservation.

name: Vikram Desai
financial_goals: Achieve financial independence (₹15Cr corpus) by age 45
Build a satellite portfolio of high-growth stocks
life_stage: Startup founder, high income but variable, single, no dependents
additional_context: Actively follows markets. Reads annual reports. Wants to pick individual stocks.
